title: Tuscan Pork Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Chinese-style stir fry with Tuscan-seasoned pork, xtra vegetables, and tender noodles. This quick and easy meal is perfect for any occasion.

ingredients.name: Xtra Noodles
ingredients.notes: Rice noodles or substitute with your favorite

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of Skillet Oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced Garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced Tuscan Pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add the cut Tender Broccoli and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add the Xtra Noodles and cook for 2 minutes, until heated through.
Add the Tuscan-seasoned Pork and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with Soy Sauce if desired.
Optional: Serve with your favorite stir-fry sauce or additional toppings.
